chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CP No.D-7475 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 08.10.2025. Mr. Muhammad Akram Tariq, Advocate for the Evacuee Trust Property Board. Mr. Mehran Khan, AAG. --------------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioners and no intimation has been received. Be that as it may, learned counsel appearing on behalf of the Evacuee Trust Property Board submits that grievance of the Petitioners has been redressed in as much as their possession has been regularized and they have been accepted as tenants of the Board. Under the circumstances, the purpose of the Petition appears to have been served. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Hyde/PS*
